# Housevilla

> Housevilla is a US rental property marketplace where tenants discover apartments, studios, condos, townhouses and single-family homes, and landlords list and manage their properties.

Housevilla helps renters across the United States find their next home with location-based search, verified listings, and a pay-to-unlock contact model that protects landlord privacy.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Housevilla and featured rental listings across the USA.
- [Browse rentals](/browse): Search and filter all available properties by type, price, bedrooms, and distance.
- [Sign in or sign up](/auth): Create an account or sign in to contact landlords and list properties.
